ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment ended */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator leading the experiment */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the participant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed by the participant */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Current occupation of the participant */,
  "consent_form_signed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the participant has signed the consent form */,
  "consent_form_date" TEXT /* Date when the consent form was signed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the trial belongs to */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who participated in the trial */,
  "trial_type" TEXT /* Type of the trial */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Experimental condition */,
  "modality" TEXT /* Modality of the trial (e.g., Extero, Intero) */,
  "stair_cond" TEXT /* Staircase condition (e.g., high, low) */,
  "n_trials" INTEGER /* Number of trials conducted */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial ended */,
  "heart_rate_outlier" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if heart rate is an outlier */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the trial was conducted */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used during the trial */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator conducting the trial */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the trial */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the trial */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_trial_type FOREIGN KEY ("trial_type") REFERENCES trial_types ("trial_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_stair_cond FOREIGN KEY ("stair_cond") REFERENCES stair_conditions ("stair_condition_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_condition FOREIGN KEY ("condition") REFERENCES experiment_conditions ("condition_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_modality FOREIGN KEY ("modality") REFERENCES modalities ("modality_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_data" (
  "trial_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial data entry */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the data belongs to */,
  "estimation" TEXT /* Estimation made by the participant (e.g., More, Less) */,
  "estimation_rt" REAL /* Reaction time for estimation */,
  "confidence" INTEGER /* Confidence level of the participant */,
  "confidence_rt" REAL /* Reaction time for confidence rating */,
  "alpha" REAL /* Alpha value */,
  "listen_bpm" REAL /* Beats per minute (BPM) during the listening phase */,
  "response_bpm" REAL /* Beats per minute (BPM) during the response phase */,
  "response_correct" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the response was correct */,
  "estimation_provided" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if an estimation was provided */,
  "rating_provided" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if a rating was provided */,
  "estimated_threshold" REAL /* Estimated threshold */,
  "estimated_slope" REAL /* Estimated slope */,
  "start_listening" TEXT /* Timestamp when the listening phase started */,
  "start_decision" TEXT /* Timestamp when the decision phase started */,
  "response_made" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was made */,
  "rating_start" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating phase started */,
  "rating_ends" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating phase ended */,
  "end_trigger" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial ended */,
  "decision_rt" REAL /* Decision reaction time */,
  "decision" TEXT /* Decision made by the participant */,
  "physiological_data" TEXT /* Additional physiological data collected */,
  "environmental_data" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the trial */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the trial data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_data_alpha FOREIGN KEY ("alpha") REFERENCES alpha_values ("alpha_value"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_data_confidence_rt FOREIGN KEY ("confidence_rt") REFERENCES reaction_times ("reaction_time"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_data_decision FOREIGN KEY ("decision") REFERENCES decisions ("decision_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_data_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_data_estimation FOREIGN KEY ("estimation") REFERENCES decisions ("decision_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_data_estimated_slope FOREIGN KEY ("estimated_slope") REFERENCES estimated_slopes ("estimated_slope"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_data_estimation_rt FOREIGN KEY ("estimation_rt") REFERENCES reaction_times ("reaction_time"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_data_listen_bpm FOREIGN KEY ("listen_bpm") REFERENCES heart_rates ("heart_rate"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_data_response_bpm FOREIGN KEY ("response_bpm") REFERENCES heart_rates ("heart_rate"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_data_estimated_threshold FOREIGN KEY ("estimated_threshold") REFERENCES estimated_thresholds ("estimated_threshold"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_data_confidence FOREIGN KEY ("confidence") REFERENCES confidence_levels ("confidence_level")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modalities" (
  "modality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modality */,
  "modality_name" TEXT /* Name of the modality */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the modality */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the modality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stair_conditions" (
  "stair_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staircase condition */,
  "stair_condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the staircase condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the staircase condition */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the staircase condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stair_condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_types" (
  "trial_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial type */,
  "trial_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the trial type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trial type */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the trial type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "decisions" (
  "decision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decision */,
  "decision_name" TEXT /* Name of the decision */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the decision */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the decision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decision_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "confidence_levels" (
  "confidence_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each confidence level */,
  "confidence_level" INTEGER /* Confidence level value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the confidence level */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the confidence level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("confidence_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reaction_times" (
  "reaction_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reaction time */,
  "reaction_time" REAL /* Reaction time value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reaction time */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the reaction time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reaction_time_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heart_rates" (
  "heart_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each heart rate */,
  "heart_rate" REAL /* Heart rate value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the heart rate */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the heart rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("heart_rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alpha_values" (
  "alpha_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alpha value */,
  "alpha_value" REAL /* Alpha value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alpha value */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the alpha value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alpha_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "estimated_thresholds" (
  "estimated_threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each estimated threshold */,
  "estimated_threshold" REAL /* Estimated threshold value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the estimated threshold */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the estimated threshold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("estimated_threshold_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "estimated_slopes" (
  "estimated_slope_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each estimated slope */,
  "estimated_slope" REAL /* Estimated slope value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the estimated slope */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the estimated slope */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("estimated_slope_id")
)
